section_name: Effect of Other Law or Ordinance
chapter_title: Highway Beautification on State Highway Right-of-way

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 392. Highway Beautification on State Highway Right-of-way
##### § 392.038 — Effect of Other Law or Ordinance

If this subchapter conflicts with another law or a local ordinance, the more restrictive provision applies.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: If this subchapter conflicts with another law or a local ordinance, the more restrictive provision applies.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
